captures.response_content_type: streaming (text stream; body taint-guarded, not byte-sampled). RSC navigation via /chats?_rsc= uses text/x-component.
captures.transport_protocol: SSE (HTTP streaming text for chat send; app shell uses Next.js RSC / text/x-component for navigation)
captures.success_response_wire_sample: POST /chat/api/send returns 200 streamed text. Companion endpoints: POST /chat/api/chat (200), /chat/api/send-site (200). Raw stream body unavailable (Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard). Anonymous scope id seen in /chat/api/rate-limit?scope=anon:<id>. Note: one /chat/api/chat/leaf returned 400 and /chat/{id} returned 503 transiently but answer still rendered.
captures.frame_separator: stream chunk-based (RSC uses self.__next_f push frames; chat stream newline/SSE-style — not byte-confirmed)
captures.dom_render_structure: outer scroll div.relative.h-full.overflow-y-scroll[@container]; div.group/message-list.mx-auto.max-w-3xl; per-message div.@container/message[data-testid][data-touch-active]; assistant answer in div.prose.prose-gray; user bubble in bordered rounded div.
captures.framework: Next.js (App Router + React Server Components; self.__next_f streaming detected, _rsc query params, /chat-static/_next/static chunks)
captures.console_errors: not separately polled; transient 400 (/chat/api/chat/leaf) + 503 (/chat/{id}) observed in network but answer rendered normally

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. v0 (Vercel code-gen assistant) worked ANONYMOUSLY without login. Benign prompt sent verbatim; assistant replied normally (greeting + 'Worked for 3s'). Chat created at /chat/test-greeting-<id>. Primary send endpoint = POST /chat/api/send. Heavy Next.js RSC app. Raw response body not sampled (taint-guard) -> CDP/HAR needed for exact envelope bytes.
